implement this in obdfilter instead of osp

parents.subject: LU-19066 osp: Create a failure_domain file and read odp_failure_domain from it

commit.subject: LU-19066 osp: store failure_domain changes persistently
commit.message:
LU-19066 osp: store failure_domain changes persistently

Store the failure_domain settings persistently when they are changed
using
lctl set_param osp.OST-name.failure_domain=value

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Ronnie Sahlberg <rsahlberg@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I14fdb03a82b1903d92c2e8617b7d3b5235834a87
